warnings.message: psutil not installed in this environment. peak_memory_mb reports 0.0 MB instead of actual RSS. Install with: pip install psutil>=5.9. No OOM observed during any run.

P95 latency is 5098 ms, driven by cross-encoder model cold-load on the first ticket. Median and subsequent-ticket latency is 288 ms. Consider pre-loading the model at startup to eliminate the cold-start spike.

Ground-truth coverage is 10 of 29 tickets (sample_support_tickets.csv). Benchmark accuracy (0.30) is measured across all 29 tickets with partial label coverage, making it an underestimate. On the labelled 10-ticket subset, accuracy is 0.90, F1 is 0.94.
product_area accuracy is 0.40, indicating the product-area classifier underperforms on area-level granularity. The domain-level classifier (HackerRank / Claude / Visa) is functional and correct.

terminal_execution.evidence: python main.py --tickets support_tickets/support_tickets.csv completed successfully. 29 tickets processed, 0 errors.

csv_input_processing.evidence: support_tickets.csv (29 rows) fully processed. Output written to output.csv with columns: issue, subject, company, response, product_area, status, request_type, intent, justification, confidence.

request_classification.evidence: modules/classifier.py (RequestTypeClassifier) + modules/intent_classifier.py (IntentClassifier, 9 intents). Both active in pipeline.

product_domain_classification.evidence: modules/classifier.py (DomainClassifier) classifies tickets to hackerrank, claude, or visa corpus.

risk_detection.evidence: modules/risk_engine.py active. Risk levels (low, medium, high) feed DecisionEngine escalation rules.

escalation_decision_logic.evidence: modules/decision_engine.py implements 8-rule hierarchy: injection → OOS/invalid → guardrail-unsafe → high-risk → low-composite-confidence → medium-risk/low-raw-confidence → no-corpus-match → reply. 16/29 tickets escalated in pipeline run.

document_retrieval.evidence: modules/retriever.py (FAISS) + modules/hybrid_retriever.py (BM25+FAISS fusion) both operational. Stream log confirms 'retrieval hits=10' per ticket.

safe_response_generation.evidence: modules/response_generator.py generates grounded responses. Guardrails + policy enforcer validate all responses before output.

logging.evidence: log.txt (346 KB) and stream.log (21 KB) both generated. log.txt uses structured per-ticket markdown format. stream.log uses pipe-delimited per-stage format.

deterministic_behavior.evidence: set_seeds(42) in main.py seeds random, numpy, and torch (conditional). seed: 42 specified in config.yaml.

hybrid_retrieval.evidence: modules/hybrid_retriever.py implements BM25Okapi + FAISS fusion. Formula verified: final = 0.6 * embedding_score + 0.4 * bm25_norm. _normalise_bm25([2,4]) = [0.5, 1.0]. Deduplication and top_docs collation confirmed. config.yaml: retrieval.method=hybrid.

reranker.evidence: modules/reranker.py uses cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2. Sigmoid normalization of raw logits to [0,1]. Stream log shows scores: 'reranker score=0.995', 'score=0.749'. Lazy-load with graceful fallback. top_n=3.

guardrails.evidence: modules/guardrails.py detects 9 sensitive categories: financial_advice, legal_advice, account_recovery, fraud, password_reset, identity_verification, payment_dispute, security_breach, medical_advice. Evidence-quality and unsupported-claim checks also active. Violations trigger escalation via DecisionEngine rule 3.

confidence_scoring.evidence: modules/confidence.py. Formula: 0.4*retrieval + 0.3*classifier + 0.2*reranker + 0.1*guardrail. Weights sum = 1.0. Threshold = 0.65. avg_confidence across 29 tickets = 0.686. Low-confidence tickets escalated via DecisionEngine rule 5.

intent_classifier.evidence: modules/intent_classifier.py. Stage 1: rule engine (9 intents, keyword patterns, RULE_THRESHOLD=0.80). Stage 2: TF-IDF + LogisticRegression trained on 180 synthetic examples. Fallback when both disabled. Stream log shows 'intent_classifier account_access(ml)' and 'out_of_scope(ml)'.

policy_citation_enforcement.evidence: modules/policy_enforcer.py. Citation detection via regex (source/reference/see also/cited from). Appends 'Source: <doc_id>' when missing. Escalates when no docs and require_citation=True. Stream log shows 'citation_added' and 'escalation template' outcomes per ticket.

streaming_logs.evidence: modules/stream_logger.py writes to support_tickets/stream.log. Format: '<timestamp> | Ticket <id> | <stage> | <status> | <latency> ms'. Fields: timestamp ✓, ticket_id ✓, stage ✓, status ✓, latency_ms ✓. Stages logged: START, classification, retrieval, reranker, intent_classifier, guardrails, decision, policy_enforcer, END.

benchmark_harness.evidence: benchmark.py runs full pipeline and writes benchmark_results.json. Fields present: n_tickets, accuracy, precision, recall, f1, escalation_rate, avg_confidence, avg_latency_ms, throughput_tps, error_count, peak_memory_mb, wall_time_s, reranker_enabled, hybrid_enabled.

evaluation_engine.evidence: modules/evaluator.py and evaluate.py. Metrics: accuracy=0.90, precision=1.0, recall=0.889, f1=0.941, escalation_rate=0.20, avg_confidence=0.63, avg_latency_ms=1105. evaluation_report.json saved. Both --mode backtest and standalone evaluate.py operational.

retry_handling.evidence: _retrieve_with_retry() in main.py implements up to 3 attempts (config retry.max_attempts=3) before forced escalation. Confirmed via test_retry_logic_returns_none_after_max_attempts and test_retry_logic_succeeds_on_second_attempt (both PASS).

config_file_support.evidence: config.yaml fully implemented. load_config() uses PyYAML safe_load(). All modules read retrieval.method, reranker.enabled, classifier.use_rules/use_ml, confidence.threshold, guardrails.strict_mode, policy.require_citation, logging.streaming, retry.max_attempts, seed.

performance_metrics.memory_target_met: UNVERIFIABLE — psutil not installed; no OOM observed

recommendations: Install psutil (pip install psutil>=5.9) to enable accurate RSS memory tracking in MetricsTracker.
Pre-load the cross-encoder model at startup (before the ticket loop) to eliminate the ~9s first-ticket cold-start latency spike and bring P95 in line with median.
Expand sample_support_tickets.csv ground-truth labels from 10 to all 29 tickets to obtain statistically meaningful benchmark accuracy numbers.
Investigate product_area classifier accuracy (currently 0.40). Consider adding more training examples or a finer-grained domain/area mapping for the Visa and Claude corpora.
Add integration test coverage for benchmark.py to ensure the harness output schema remains stable across code changes.
